title: Star Wars Arcade

'''''Star Wars Arcade''''', or simply '''''Star Wars''''', is an [[Wikipedia:arcade game|arcade game]] produced by [[Sega]] and released in [[1994]]. The game is a first-person [[Wikipedia:space simulator|space simulator]], based around scenes from [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']], especially the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

A home version of the game was later released by Sega in [[November]] 1994 on the [[Wikipedia:32X|32X]] video game system. The new version featured eight levels versus the arcade game's four levels, now including the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|attack]] on the original [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] from [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].

==Contents==
Between missions, [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] activates [[Autopilot/Legends|auto pilot]] and takes the player to the next level, usually jumping through [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. The Sega version has the option to choose Arcade Mode to more closely mimic the original game.

===Arcade===
#'''Dogfight''' - [[TIE series/Legends|TIE fighters]] and [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] in an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] field
#'''Super Star Destroyer''' - Enter and destroy a [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|Super Star Destroyer]]
#'''Surface Ops''' - [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] surface
#'''Death Star II''' - Enter the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] and destroy its power generator

===Sega 32X===
[[File:DeathStar-SWArcade.jpg|250px|thumb|Attack on the Death Star (Sega version)]]
#'''First Blood''' - TIE fighters in an asteroid field
#'''Dogfight I''' - TIE fighters and Star Destroyers
#'''Surface Ops''' - [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] surface
#'''Death Star Trenches''' - Death Star [[Meridian trench/Legends|trench]] run
#'''Dogfight II''' - TIE fighters and Star Destroyers
#'''Super Star Destroyer''' - Enter and destroy a Super Star Destroyer
#'''Search and Destroy''' - Death Star II surface
#'''Death Star''' - Enter the second Death Star and destroy its power generator
